metadata.description: Sergi Parpal's Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: burgess
plugins.description: The full creative cycle in one plugin: turn a conceptual document into a rigorously-grounded, queryable knowledge graph (human-editable canon, three-axis provenance, span-present write boundary, grounding loop with memory of failures), and diverge from any brief with a geometry-driven ideation engine (MAP-Elites, k-NN novelty, DPP slates, anti-collapse monitor) that proposes into the hypothesized lane — embeddings measure dispersion, never truth.
